message:
ci(installer): skip preflight check in CI containers

GitHub Actions containers have ~17GB disk space which fails the 20GB
minimum preflight check. Skip preflight in CI since we can't control
the container disk allocation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -114,7 +114,8 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Run installer
         run: |
-          bash install.sh --yes --mode ${{ matrix.mode }}
+          # Skip preflight in CI - GitHub Actions containers have limited disk (17GB < 20GB required)
+          bash install.sh --yes --skip-preflight --mode ${{ matrix.mode }}
 
       - name: Run doctor
         run: |
